About Me

Defending systems.
One alert at a time.

Cybersecurity isn't just what I do — it's how I think. As a freshly graduated MS in Cybersecurity professional from UT Dallas, I bring a rare combination of hands-on SOC experience and academic depth in security policy.

I built my foundation at NTT DATA inside a live Security Operations Center — reviewing hundreds of alerts daily, following escalation playbooks under real pressure, and learning that speed and accuracy aren't opposites. Two years of that sharpened instincts no classroom can teach.

From there I moved into vulnerability management at Tavant Technologies, running Qualys VMDR scans, correlating findings in SIEM, and hardening cloud access with Netskope CASB. And as a Network Technician at UTD, I learned that understanding infrastructure is half the security battle.

Now, degree in hand, I'm ready for the next mission.

🛡️
Threat Detection
Trained to separate real threats from noise inside live MDR/SIEM environments — reduced false-positive volume by 35–40% at NTT DATA.
🔍
Vulnerability Management
Run end-to-end vulnerability assessments using Qualys VMDR, correlate findings in SIEM, and prioritize what needs fixing before attackers get there first.
☁️
Cloud Security
Configure cloud access controls using Netskope CASB and integrate XDR detection rules to protect web and cloud environments from unauthorized access.
📋
Policy & Compliance
MS-level understanding of how security policy, regulations like FERPA, and real-world defense strategy connect — from the SOC floor to the boardroom.

Live SOC Experience
  • Reviewed incoming security alerts every day and filtered out false alarms, reducing unnecessary alerts by 35–40% so the team could focus only on real threats.
  • Sorted and responded to security events faster by building a clear system to categorize incidents, cutting average response time by 20–30% across all monitored devices.
  • Followed step-by-step security response playbooks to handle serious incidents calmly and correctly, always resolving issues within client-agreed time limits.
  • Monitored network traffic for a major telecom company to spot DDoS attacks and escalated confirmed threats immediately for fast mitigation.

Research · Capstone
K-12 Cybersecurity Framework
Small schools are big targets with small budgets. Studied 32 real breach reports, scored 7 security controls by impact, and delivered a practical FERPA-aligned playbook any school can afford — focused on MFA, email filtering, and encryption.
